versions.version_description: I added a tab for the solo, and all the chords were accurate to the ones in the song. I saw many of the other tabs missed an important chord (B5).

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Hey! This is my first tab, so sorry if it's incorrect.

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
Well, I got me a boy, turned him into a man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
Told him all the things that he didn't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Woah, and then I let him go[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]
Now, there's one in California who's been cursing my name[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]
Cause I found me a better lover in the UK[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Hey, until I made my getaway[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch]
One, Two, Three, they gonna run back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]B7[/ch]
Cause I'm the best baby that they never gonna keep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch]
One, Two, Three, they gonna run back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]B7[/ch]      
They always wanna come but they never wanna leave[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Ex's, and oh, oh, oh's they haunt me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Like ghosts they need me to make em all[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
And they won't let go[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Ex's and oh's[/tab]


[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]B7[/ch]     
I had a summer lover down in New Orleans[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
Kept him warm in the winter, left him frozen in the spring[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
My, my, how the seasons go by[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]B7[/ch]
I get high, and I love to get low[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]          
So the hearts keep breaking and the heads just roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
You know, that's how the story goes[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch]
One, two, three, they gonna run back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]
Cause I'm the best baby that they never gonna keep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch] 
One, two, three, they gonna run back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]B7[/ch]
They always wanna come but they never wanna leave[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Ex's, and oh, oh, oh's they haunt me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Like ghosts they need me to make em all[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
And they won't let go[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Ex's, and oh, oh, oh's they haunt me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Like ghosts they need me to make em all[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
And they won't let go[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Ex's and oh's[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]
One, two, three, they gonna run back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]B7[/ch]
Climbing over mountains and a-sailing over seas[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]B7[/ch]
